sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67777" key="mikrotexni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-τεχνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pettiness in art</tr_>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:p.110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
